DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICAS: (1) NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL APPRAISAL AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF APPRAISAL; (2) MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES
(ADCAL PER LRA EMAIL ON 3/20/23)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Meng Meng Zhang, Esq. 415-882-5000 Dentons US LLP for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTY STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTY AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Not contested/Discussed. JPT Deol and Ms. Zhang did not receive any contest email. The Court will sign the proposed order submitted by counsel. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICAS' MOTION TO COMPEL APPRAISAL AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF APPRAISAL.

The motion to compel appraisal and for a stay is granted. The appraisal clause in the Agreement makes clear that the appraisal process is mandatory if one of the parties invokes it, which Defendant has done. Defendant has not waived its right to compel the appraisal. Because an appraisal clause is to be treated like an arbitration clause, the case is hereby stayed under CCP 1281.4, pending the completion of the appraisal process in the Agreement. The parties are ordered to select their respective appraiser within twenty (20) calendar days of Defendant's filing and service of a notice of entry of this order.

Ms. Zhang submits a proposed order in Word format to Judge Pro Tem Deol at jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com for signature.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICAS' MOTION TO COMPEL APPRAISAL AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF APPRAISAL.(FOR TENTATIVE RULING ONLY. PART 2 OF 2)
